response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive senior-level experience in software development, architecture, and leadership, particularly in open-source and full-stack environments. His background aligns well with the technical and leadership requirements of the role, though his German proficiency is a notable gap.
strengths: Proven track record in senior software development roles at top-tier tech companies (Google, Meta), showcasing strong technical leadership and architectural expertise.
Deep experience with open-source technologies, Linux/Unix environments, and modern software development practices (TDD, CI/CD, UML-adjacent modeling).
Demonstrated ability to mentor teams, lead projects, and advise on technical strategy, including contributions to AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling.
concerns: German language proficiency is listed as 'Basic,' which falls short of the required C1 level for client-facing and operational leadership.
Limited explicit experience in IT consulting or direct client advisory roles, which are core to the position's responsibilities.
While strong in development, his project management and strategic IT system design experience are less prominently highlighted.

key_factors.factor: IT consulting and client advisory experience
